subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Jinab-i-Ukht
subcodes.first_line: The first remembrance uttered by the Tongue of Majesty and Grandeur rest upon thee, O thou exalted leaf shining from the horizon of Command
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول ذکر خرج من لسان العظمه و الکبریاء علیک یا ایتها الورقه العلیا و المشرقه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @chastisement and requital, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @visitation Tablets
